programme.desc: How does blood carry oxygen? Dr Tosin sends Dr Xand and Dr Chris through blood vessel tunnels to find out. And Dr Raph meets robots being trialled for magnetic vine surgery.

programme.desc: Mr Friendlyface is particularly tetchy this morning. programme.title: High Hoops
programme.desc: Aoife’s plan to keep Zara at Midvale backfires, leading her to be mistaken for a genius while Zara plays dumb. Can she outsmart her own scheme and get the old Zara back?

programme.desc: Joe and Adam take on a rip-roaring rodeo challenge. Can they gain their cowboy credentials and lasso like a pro, or will they fall off their high horse?

programme.desc: Big Manny joins for an icy challenge, and it’s time to jump in with both feet as Callum sets Adam and Joe an extreme puzzle challenge 15,000 feet in the air!

programme.desc: The Farmer receives a mystery gift from his antipodean cousin. Unimpressed with the present, he attempts to throw it away, only for it to keep reappearing. He becomes convinced it has magical powers.

programme.desc: Our dynamic duo take on a shoddy army of knock-offs when alien Quark's latest money-making scheme is to create cheap copies of Danger Mouse and Penfold.

All they have to do is quest to the Tree of Certain Doom and pass his challenges. But the squirrel queen is not who she appears to be, and the heroes have to quickly un-quest their quest.

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: When Boy, Girl and Cheese learn that their animal siblings have a tough time going through life with their unwieldy tails, they want to understand what it's like. So Mouse builds them mechanical tails to wear, and the three soon learn just how hard it is to do simple tasks. However, they come to master their tails well enough to attend the Curling Tail festival, where all tailed animals celebrate themselves. But when the kids turn their tails to full power to fit in better, they go haywire! They're now in danger of ruining the festival and being discovered as frauds!

Unfortunately, when a runaway Danny crashes through the disco it looks like the whole thing might be off. Can Mick save the day?

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: The Guardians are Santa Claus, the Easter Bunny, the Tooth Fairy and the Sandman. Their job, as well as bringing happiness to children around the world, is to protect them. When the evil spirit Pitch comes to Earth, bringing an army of nightmares with him, the Guardians spring into action to protect the children while they sleep. But Pitch is powerful, and they need help from a reluctant new team member: the impish spirit of winter, Jack Frost. Featuring the voices of Chris Pine (Jack Frost), Alec Baldwin (North), Jude Law (Pitch), Isla Fisher (Tooth), Hugh Jackman (Bunny) and Dakota Goyo (Jamie Bennett).

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: Captain Barnacles and Peso become lost in a dangerous maze of underwater caves while helping a baby octopus get home, and the rest of the Octonauts must rescue them!

programme.desc: When Timmy sees a particularly grumpy farmer giving one of the flock a hard time, he decides to give him an idea of what it's like to be a sheep. But when the time comes to have the old farmer back, things aren't quite so simple.

programme.desc: Torn between practising Blamjitsu with the yeti and helping the Dinmakers write a new school song, JJ tries to combine the two by bringing the yeti along to band practice disguised as a very hairy roadie.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. When Big Bob picks up his grandchildren for a day at the wharf in spite of Bob's worries that his father's pessimism about the world will eventually affect them negatively, the Belcher kids sneak into a booth that controls a fortune-telling clam attraction and get accidentally locked inside - meanwhile, Linda struggles with helping Teddy take a friendly photo of himself for a handyman services website.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts as a brave contestant takes on the infamous Banker in the exciting and iconic gameshow and, by opening those iconic 22 red boxes in the right order, could be in with the chance of winning a life-changing cash prize. There are no questions here except for one: Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. The Titans decide to go off-grid after being outraged at the prices they pay for water, gas and electricity.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Animated series inspired by the classic Looney Tunes shorts. Sylvester gets hungry for room service when Tweety Bird goes to a hotel, Daffy Duck is up to his old tricks, and Bugs Bunny expands a buzzard's palette.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Animated fun with Scooby-Doo and the gang. The gang investigate Sheriff Stone's claims of aliens arriving in Crystal Cove and their objective to conquer the planet and enslave the human race, but have these 'extraterrestrial beings' arrived from closer to home and for reasons less terrifying?

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Tucker from the East Midlands is hoping to be impressed by the style choices of three single ladies.

programme.title: Billie & Greg: The Family Diaries
programme.desc: Reality series. It's the end of the school holidays and the Shepherds are enjoying the last of the summer as a friendly family football game sees Billie and Greg go head-to-head with shocking results, Nelly heads off to pony camp, and Arthur prepares to start at a new school but is unhappy with his uniform. It's also nearly time for the biggest night in the TV calendar as the NTAs approach - Billie still doesn't have a dress for the event, but a fortunate last-minute decision sees her and Greg hit the red carpet at the star-studded event.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Love is in the air in Essex as it's Junaid and Joe's one-year anniversary - they celebrate with a night away in a lodge and reflect on their relationship and how far they've come. When they return home, there is a package waiting for them from Harry - as the pair work out if it is a goodwill gesture or if it will sour their celebrations, Saff, Ella, Elma and Wills play padel and the new lothario finds that he has got his work cut out with these three strong single women. Elsewhere, Diags opens up to Dan about his future with Jodie - things have been looking good and they have been happier than ever, but not everything may be as rosy as it seems. Meanwhile, Amy and Jordan decide to stage an intervention between Harry and Saff as the pair have been on bad terms since the Portugal trip - Harry and Saff have always managed to resolve their issues, but they may have gone too far this time to find a way back.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: Living on the Edge: US reality series. NeNe receives a frosty reception when she arrives in Toronto. A group trust exercise forces the ladies to live on the edge. [S] S12 Ep10

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Follow the lavish lives of six savvy champagne-swilling Beverly Hills women who were born for shopping and partying! The 14th series reunion continues as Kyle and Dorit face off over Kyle's text to PK and put more strain on their already fragile friendship, Boz stands firm on her claim that one of the women is not telling the truth, the fabulous Jennifer Tilly joins the action - but it isn't all diamonds and caviar when she is called out for her shady comments - and Sutton is put in the hot seat by the arrival of Kathy Hilton and for short-changing the size of Dorit's wallet.

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show where three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles as they compete in the ultimate supermarket challenge to win a 3,000-pound prize - along with the classic Supermarket Sweep quizzes, trolley dashes and pastel jumpers, the revamped show features exciting new games, challenges and some famous faces.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Graham Norton invites celebrities Tom Allen, Michelle Visage and Eddie Kadi to spin the Wheel to get the chance to play for 50,000 pounds for charity.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Cheshire
programme.desc: Reality series. Ampika hosts a lavish charity event and instructs the ladies to be on their best behaviour - with Lystra still reeling, Rachel exasperated, and Paige determined to get answers, the masks are slipping from the start.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Cheshire
programme.desc: Reality series. The Housewives join host Brian Dowling on the sofa and are ready to celebrate and debate the twists and triumphs shared during the milestone 10th anniversary series as he asks the tough questions that everyone wants answers to.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: Snake Bye: Porsha receives a surprise from ex-fiance Dennis, and Kenya, Kandi and Porsha wonder who is responsible for the alleged recording of Cynthia. [S] S12 Ep11

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Follow the lavish lives of six savvy champagne-swilling Beverly Hills women who were born for shopping and partying! The 14th series reunion concludes as Sutton and Dorit continue to go head-to-head, Erika is forced to confront Tom's damning conviction and also reveal how this saga has impacted her relationship with her son, and Kyle tearfully explores the end of her marriage while big sister Kathy struggles to wrap her head around it - as the night draws to a close, one Housewife storms off and leaves the rest of the women stunned and confused.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Chris Bisson, Ruth Madeley, and Ardal O'Hanlon all trying to 'say what they see' as they guess well-known phrases for the chance to win a 50,000-pound jackpot for their chosen charity.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Graham Norton hosts as accountant John, primary school teacher Jess, and care home assistant Paris all get spinning the wheel and solving puzzles to try to take home a massive 50,000 pounds.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show where the questions are all about logic and common sense and where the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show, but only some of them will get near the chance to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right for up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The American version of Gordon Ramsay's culinary boot camp. The chefs face their toughest critic yet when tasked with elevating a classic Southern staple, but communication breakdowns then threaten to derail dinner service and leave Chef Ramsay fuming - from uneven cooking temperatures to poor timing between stations, even the simplest mistakes could spell the end for one contestant.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. After becoming addicted to a flight simulator app, Brian becomes convinced that he can fly a plane with ease and boards Quagmire's next flight to prove it - when Quagmire and his co-pilot Jim come down with food poisoning, Brian successfully lands the plane and he and Quagmire go on a press tour to share their story. Elsewhere, Lois's childhood Easy-Bake Oven inspires Stewie to open a boutique pizza place.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Meg becomes a getaway driver, and when Quagmire is unable to cure his hiccups, he asks Peter to kill him.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Peter does a noir-style investigation of Meg's disappearance.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: US animated comedy series. The Smiths return from a difficult and quarrelsome holiday, only to end up on a desert island with no memory of who they are and an obsession with an old advertisement for mixed nuts.

programme.title: The Bob's Burgers Movie
programme.desc: A feature-length spin-off from the cult animated TV series. When a ruptured water main creates an enormous sinkhole right in front of Bob's Burgers, it blocks the entrance indefinitely and ruins the Belchers' plans for a successful summer - as Bob and Linda struggle to keep the business afloat, the kids try to solve a mystery that could save their family's restaurant. With dangers mounting, these underdogs help each other find hope and fight to get back behind the counter where they belong.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: The drama continues in Essex with Ella's birthday party - when Harry tells her that he's spotted Dan and his new girl on a double date with Jodie and Diags, Ella questions Jodie's loyalty before Jodie feels awkward and leaves the party. Following the fallout from Ella's party, Dan is not happy that Harry has been talking to Ella about his business and decides to call him to have it out - meanwhile, Elma organises a surprise birthday bash for Courtney so she can redo her 30th birthday and have the party she deserves. Elma recruits Saff, Jordan, Freddie and Dani to help - following their recent dramas, Saff, Harry, Liv and Freddie then come face to face at the party. Amidst the drama, there is a new face on the scene as Amy's newly single brother Wills heads out to dinner with Amy, Billy, Jordan and Sophie - Amy thinks Wills could be a good match for Elma, but when she mentions this to Elma, Saff reveals that she has history with Wills.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: There is cause for celebration in Essex as Dani finally passes her driving test on her seventh attempt - to celebrate Dani's success, Saff throws her a congratulatory party and includes Junaid on the invite list, but Dani is not impressed that Junaid is there. Picking up on the awkward atmosphere, Junaid decides to leave but not before congratulating his old friend - Saff witnesses this conversation and decides to leave the party with Junaid. Elsewhere at Dani's party, tensions also simmer when Liv and Freddie come face to face for the first time since their heated conversation - Liv approaches Freddie and admits that things got out of control as the two try to bury the hatchet. Meanwhile, Saff and Ella bump into Wills at his flower stall and the girls have a bit of flirty banter with him - Ella tells Saff that Wills is a bit of her and Saff admits that she still finds him sexy. The girls joke that they can fight for him, but they also know that Elma has caught his eye too.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Love is in the air in Essex as it's Junaid and Joe's one-year anniversary - they celebrate with a night away in a lodge and reflect on their relationship and how far they've come. When they return home, there is a package waiting for them from Harry - as the pair work out if it is a goodwill gesture or if it will sour their celebrations, Saff, Ella, Elma and Wills play padel and the new lothario finds that he has got his work cut out with these three strong single women. Elsewhere, Diags opens up to Dan about his future with Jodie - things have been looking good and they have been happier than ever, but not everything may be as rosy as it seems. Meanwhile, Amy and Jordan decide to stage an intervention between Harry and Saff as the pair have been on bad terms since the Portugal trip - Harry and Saff have always managed to resolve their issues, but they may have gone too far this time to find a way back.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series about a policeman in Yorkshire in the 1960s. Nick gets word that a violent criminal is to be released from prison and may be heading his way - meanwhile, snow falling in Aidensfield leaves Kate cut off with a heavily pregnant woman.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: Crime drama. East Sussex CID emerges from the ashes of a shocking betrayal and prepares for a major criminal trial - after Grace's team intercepted millions of pounds of cocaine being smuggled into Newhaven port in a case where courier Daniel Starr worked for an elusive figure known as The Merchant, who had evaded identification for years, Starr gave up The Merchant's identity and Grace is determined to see him go down for his crimes as the ruthless drug lord faces trial. Meanwhile, Brighton resident Meg Magellan's daughter Laura leaves for a gap year and Meg receives a jury summons which brings with it a terrifying dilemma - as the trial unravels, Grace becomes convinced that The Merchant is trying to destabilise the case against him and must work doggedly to find whoever is doing his dirty work. As a double murder at a local park throws his team into a puzzling case, Grace is pushed to the brink to see justice done before an unwelcome conversation burdens him with a terrible secret.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A man is found in the middle of a crop circle, naked, with two puncture wounds on his back and the back of his head shaved. A Ufologist claims extra terrestrial involvement but DCI Tom Barnaby looks for a more plausible explanation. When a series of bodies are found in crop circles in the cornfields of Sir Harry Chatwyn, squire of the village of Midsomer Parva, it looks like a case of extra terrestrial kidnapping. Two bodies, bearing the classic hallmarks of alien abduction burnt fingers, a puncture wound to the lower back and a chunk cut out of the hair - seem to provide evidence that UFOs do exist. But when Inspector Barnaby and Sergeant Troy dig deeper, it seems there could be a far more simple explanation for these deaths cold blooded murder motivated by greed, love and jealousy.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the death of Professor Miranda Thornton after she apparently killed herself when her dating video was leaked onto a vicious media blog - Lewis does not believe that Thornton's death was suicide and has qualms about Kit Renton, the blog's founder, and Sophie Leland, the owner of the dating website. When one of Renton's employees is found murdered, the police realise she must have been killed because she knew something about Thornton's death - as Lewis finds that Thornton, Renton and Leland were all at Oxford together 20 years before, he realises that this is actually an age-old revenge story...

programme.title: Steptoe and Son Ride Again
programme.desc: The second feature-length spin-off from the classic sitcom. Things are bad at the Steptoes' Shepherd's Bush rag-and-bone business - so bad, in fact, that Harold, who is always on the lookout for ways to improve his lot, invests his father's life savings in a greyhound who is almost blind and can't see the hare. When this plot fails, Harold is convinced that Albert must die so he can collect the old man's life insurance, so he asks him to play along with his latest bright idea...

programme.title: Carry On... Don't Lose Your Head
programme.desc: British comedy in which the Carry On team have an irreverent poke at the French Revolution. In 1789 Paris, two English noblemen called Sir Rodney Ffing and Lord Darcy take it upon themselves to rescue their French counterparts from the clutches of the revolting masses, Citizen Robespierre, and the notorious Madame Guillotine. The Black Fingernail and his sidekick prove elusive, but Camembert - the chief of the secret police - and his comrade Bidet are determined to track them down...

programme.title: Carry On Girls
programme.desc: Bawdy British comedy. In one of the later Carry On films, local businessman and councillor Sidney Fiddler convinces the town council of a rundown seaside resort to stage a beauty contest by persuading them that it will be a marvellous publicity stunt - however, the idea meets with fervent opposition from the local Women's Liberation group, who are led by the fearsome Councillor Prodworthy, as they attempt to sabotage the contest.

programme.title: Carry On Dick
programme.desc: Bawdy British comedy. It is 1750 and King George has set up the Bow Street Runners to combat the increase in crime - many highwaymen are captured, but not Dick Turpin, the most notorious of all. While disguised as a rector, his maid, and an organ player respectively, Dick and his accomplices are terrorising the countryside around Upper Dencher. Sir Roger Daley is determined to catch them at all costs with the help of Captain Fancey and Sergeant Jock Strapp, but will they escape Roger's grasp?

programme.title: Carry On Abroad
programme.desc: Classic British comedy. A package holiday abroad turns into a hilarious adventure for some unlucky holidaymakers - staying at the shoddy Palace Hotel on the island of Elsbels, they are disrupted by bad plumbing, a restaurant filled with mosquitoes, and a dawn chorus of cement mixers. All of this is on top of several intermarital and extramarital complications and misunderstandings during the stay - will all be well, or will all be hell? Innuendos and gags abound in this very British romp.

programme.title: Carry On Matron
programme.desc: Classic British comedy with the Carry On team about a gang's plan to raid a maternity hospital to steal a gigantic stock of birth control pills. One of the gang gets the lie of the land by disguising himself as a nurse, but the hospital's hypochondriac head doctor - who begins to make amorous advances towards him - and a formidable matron prove constant obstacles to the heist.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a GP who relocates to the sleepy Cornish hamlet of Portwenn. Martin is called to Louisa's new home after she has a dizzy spell while shifting furniture - Martin urges her to slow down but is then shocked to learn that Louisa has applied to be her school's headteacher again. Martin is asked to join the interview panel for the headteacher position as a school governor, but his invitation is withdrawn when he makes it clear that he thinks that Louisa is now unsuited for the role - meanwhile, the Doc treats an elegant elderly couple who want a disabled persons' parking permit so they can park near the shops, Al needs some money fast and offers to sort out all Louisa's household and plumbing problems if she can pay him before the weekend, the school secretary comes to Martin complaining of hay fever, and Edith brings Martin an ingenious gift to help him get the surgeon's job in London - however, the well-intended present ends up having unexpected consequences...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a GP who relocates to the sleepy Cornish hamlet of Portwenn. Martin visits London to meet with Robert Dashwood, the leader of the selection process for the prestigious London surgeon's job that he has applied for - while on the train back to Cornwall, Martin is annoyed to be seated next to local sheep farmer Jim Selkirk. When Jim slumps onto Martin's shoulder after he falls asleep, Martin discovers that he has died of heart failure - after returning to Portwenn, Martin is visited by Jim's widow as she looks for emotional comfort. When the widow then starts to see visions of her dead husband and collapses in a sheep pen, Martin is able to uncover the medical reason behind her hallucinations - meanwhile, Joan's punishment of a naughty schoolboy on an educational trip leads to a threatening letter from a solicitor when the boy's family accuse her of causing an illness in their son. Can the Doc identify the real source of the sickness and clear Joan's name?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. The brutal murder of a village postman leads Barnaby to a hotbed of adultery within remote Goodman's Land - as more murders rock the tiny hamlet, can community WPC Jay Nash help untangle the web of sexual liaisons to find the killer?

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Miss Marple is shocked when her old friend Father Gorman is brutally murdered after visiting a dying parishioner. She is further surprised when she receives a letter from Gorman, sent moments before his death, which contains a list of names. When Detective Inspector Lejeune dismisses the list, Miss Marple is determined to seek justice for her friend herself. She finds another copy of the list at the parishioner's home, and a clue which leads her to The Pale Horse, an inn run by three modern-day witches who claim to be able to kill using black magic. While in the area, she attends a ritual 'burning' in memory of famous witch Goody Carne and meets locals including folklore historian Mark Easterbrook. Then a guest at The Pale Horse is found dead, and Miss Marple fears there may be worse to come. She must go to dangerous lengths to uncover the truth behind the mystery. Is magic really someone's weapon of choice or is there something even more sinister at work?

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Classic sitcom about a chirpy bus driver and his conductor pal. Stan and Jack eavesdrop on a medical check-up that Blakey is having, but they end up jumping to the wrong conclusions.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Detective drama series. Wycliffe and Kersey exchange strong words as they investigate a disturbing case involving the contamination of jars of baby food in a local supermarket by a blackmailer - meanwhile, the disciplinary enquiry into Wycliffe's team continues to run its course.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Drama series about a Cornwall police detective. Wycliffe and the team find themselves dealing with more than a missing persons case when a lone yachtswoman disappears and her boat is discovered scuttled on the seabed.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Fearful Symmetry: When a babysitter is found dead, Lewis and Hathaway are drawn into diverse new worlds including squats, swinging suburbia, primate labs and fetish photography. [SL,S,AD] S6 Ep3

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: When a train swerves towards the 4:50 from Paddington, Elspeth McGillicuddy sees a woman in the parallel carriage being strangled and the murderer's shape silhouetted against the window. The authorities think that Miss McGillicuddy must have been dreaming as there is no trace of a body, but her old friend Miss Marple knows better and the two elderly ladies begin their own investigation into the mystery.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a GP who relocates to the sleepy Cornish hamlet of Portwenn. Martin is called to Louisa's new home after she has a dizzy spell while shifting furniture - Martin urges her to slow down but is then shocked to learn that Louisa has applied to be her school's headteacher again. Martin is asked to join the interview panel for the headteacher position as a school governor, but his invitation is withdrawn when he makes it clear that he thinks that Louisa is now unsuited for the role - meanwhile, the Doc treats an elegant elderly couple who want a disabled persons' parking permit so they can park near the shops, Al needs some money fast and offers to sort out all Louisa's household and plumbing problems if she can pay him before the weekend, the school secretary comes to Martin complaining of hay fever, and Edith brings Martin an ingenious gift to help him get the surgeon's job in London - however, the well-intended present ends up having unexpected consequences...

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about two crime-solving gardeners. The Garden Open Day Scheme is the highlight of the social calendar in the village of Rowfield - when Grania Monkton, the local scheme organiser, discovers that the gardens of the main contestants are all afflicted with the same blight, she calls in Rosemary and Thyme to try to save the good name of Rowfield. However, events take a darker turn when Donald Westward, Gloria's rival for village organiser, is found dead and his garden wrecked - all fingers point to Barry and Tracey Skinner, the local builder and his wife, while the scruffy and rustic Judd is acting suspiciously. Meanwhile, Donald's wife Norah believes that her husband was having an affair with Vilma Hockham, a new arrival from South Africa - was his death an accident, or is someone targeting the contestants as well as sabotaging their gardens?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When council clerk Martin Barrett is shot dead, Barnaby and Jones discover that he was an expert blackmailer. They investigate which of his victims hated him enough to kill him, and the trail leads to Fennacombe Bay. Why are Richard and Maggie Florian spending so much time at sea - and could police committee chairman Sir John Waverley have a scandalous past? With the help of a former policeman turned fisherman, Barnaby takes to the waves to find out.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Midsomer Worthy choir, which includes Joyce Barnaby, are in fear for their lives when baritone Connor Simpson is killed days before a competition - Barnaby and Jones investigate in an atmosphere of bitter rivalry and tense marital relationships before birdwatcher Sam Judd is shot dead. What is the link between the dead men, and can the detectives find the killer before the choral showdown?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Controversial plans to build a Goodfare supermarket in Elverton-cum-Latterly lead to murder when a man is stabbed to death - Frank Hopkirk was advising on pollution at the proposed site but seemed to spend more time visiting female residents for sport and 'cookery lessons'. Can Barnaby and Jones discover the truth about village life and learn what is really polluting Elverton?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby begins to question the guilt of a Midsomer Malham woman who is on trial for the murder of her best friend - the evidence is stacked against her, but she does not appear deluded or obsessed with the dead woman's husband as the prosecution claim. With the help of the key witness - a frail pensioner - can Barnaby and Jones discover what really happened on the night of the murder?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. When wealthy betting shop magnate Alun Wilmott is shot and killed in front of his wife and daughter during a terrifying home invasion, it's assumed that he is the unlucky victim of a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: DI Frost is called to the scene of a kidnapping where the driver and conductor of a Denton bus have been captured and hidden away in what turns out to be a revenge plot on the part of two people whose relatives were killed when a lorry driver ploughed into a bus queue a few years before - simultaneously, Frost is investigating a series of credit card thefts and the mysterious death of children's entertainer Charlie the Chuckling Clown in the backstreets of Denton. As the main plot gathers momentum, Frost, Toolan and DS Drake race against the clock in an attempt to rescue the kidnap victims before it's too late.

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: The first episode of a drama series about CS Forester's famous seafaring hero. Spithead, Portsmouth, 1793 - a storm is raging in the English Channel and a small shore boat is being lashed by squally rain as two oarswomen battle against the waves. Huddled at the stern is a pale-faced 17-year-old making his maiden voyage to a career in the Royal Navy - soaked to the skin in his ill-fitting uniform, doctor's son Horatio Hornblower steps aboard his first ship, the HMS Justinian. This shy and stuttering seaman is set to become the most gallant and redoubtable figure in naval history, but his peers are wary of his intelligence and malicious Midshipman Jack Simpson adds the new recruit to his list of targets - when Simpson accuses Hornblower of cheating at cards, Hornblower snaps and challenges Simpson to a duel to settle their differences once and for all. The other men think Horatio is mad, but they also think they know that Simpson is the best shot in the navy...
